modules.source: import { computed, toRef } from 'vue'; export function storeToRefs(store) { const refs = {}; for (const key in store) { const value = store[key]; if (value?.effect) { refs[key] = computed(() => store[key]); } else { refs[key] = toRef(store, key); } } return refs; }

import { ref, watchEffect } from 'vue'; import { storeToRefs } from './storeToRefs'; const { count: payload } = storeToRefs({ count: 0 }); const ready = ref(false); const enabled = ref(false); watchEffect(() => { if (!ready.value) return; if (enabled.value) { try { for (const item of [1]) { if (item) { payload.value; } } } finally { sink(); } } });
